verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's the Holy Ghost and fire Keeping me alive, keeping me alive, Keeping me alive. It's the Holy Ghost and fire Keeping me alive Jesus is keeping me alive.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's all over me And it's keeping me alive, Keeping me alive, Keeping me alive. It's all over me And it's keeping me alive Jesus is keeping me alive.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's the Message of the Hour That's keeping me alive, keeping me alive, Keeping me alive. It's the Message of the Hour That's keeping me alive Jesus is keeping me alive.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Devil doesn't like it But it's keeping me alive, Keeping me alive, Keeping me alive. The Devil doesn't like it But it's keeping me alive Jesus is keeping me alive.
